speaker: Pico
text: The target 'apparently lounges here a lot'? That's a lot of bullshit.

speaker: Pico
text: I haven't even seen this guy once across the week I've been here.

speaker: Pico
text: This is so inefficient. Don't understand why I'm not provided his address or anything like that. I could just stake his house and like... fire at him, get it done much easier.

speaker: Pico
text: There's a dumpster near by. And no one's around. It would be a perfect time for him to show up now.

speaker: Pico
text: But of course he's not gonna come over because that's what always happens!

speaker: Pico
text: Or maybe I'm not being conspicious enough and I'm scaring him off.

speaker: Pico
text: Actually hold on, wait, I see someone coming...

speaker: Pico
text: So far he looks like he's matching the description.

speaker: Pico
text: He looks a bit familiar though. Whatever. I'm still going to shoot—

speaker: Pico
text: Fuck, oh god, I would have never taken up this job if I knew I had to kill him.

speaker: Pico
text: I gotta act normal or something, he's coming over. Yep, he's approaching me.
